tasks.title: GET /v1/invoices/:id/timeline — invoice status history
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/invoices/:id/timeline. Returns a timeline of status events for an invoice.

tasks.title: GET /v1/metrics/top-currencies — most used payment currencies
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/metrics/top-currencies. Returns top currencies by invoice count.

tasks.title: GET /v1/agents/:agentId/activity — recent activity for agent
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/agents/:agentId/activity. Returns the 10 most recent invoices for an agent.

tasks.title: GET /v1/settlements/pending — invoices awaiting settlement
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/settlements/pending. Returns all PROCESSING invoices.

tasks.title: GET /v1/health/metrics — runtime performance metrics
tasks.description: New endpoint: GET /v1/health/metrics. Returns Node.js runtime metrics.
